scripts.build: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && node scripts/prisma-generate.mjs && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/tsup/dist/cli-default.js apps/api/src/index.ts --format esm --platform node --target node22 --out-dir apps/api/dist --sourcemap --clean && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build --config apps/web/vite.config.ts
scripts.test: node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --root apps/api --hookTimeout 30000 test/server.test.ts && node node_modules/vitest/vitest.mjs run --config apps/web/vite.config.ts
